---
title: "STM_authoress"
author: "Bae."
format: html
editor: visual
---

## 데이터 전처리

```{r}

# 1. 패키지 로드
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stm)

# 2. 데이터 불러오기 (실행 파일과 같은 폴더)
base_dir <- getwd()
data_file <- file.path(base_dir, "authoress_Token.xlsx")
df <- read_excel(data_file)

# 3. 변수명 확인
print(names(df))
# 예상: Year, Month, Day, Publisher, Title, Token, Voca, ... 등

# 4. 불용어(stopwords) 지정
stopwords <- c(
  '여류'

  
)

# 5. (선택) 날짜 변수 합치기
df <- df %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(sprintf("%04d-%02d-%02d", Year, Month, Day)))

# 6. Token 열이 factor면 character로 변환
df$Token <- as.character(df$Token)

# 7. vocab 중복 제거
all_tokens <- unlist(strsplit(df$Token, " "))
vocab <- unique(all_tokens)

# 8. STM용 입력 데이터 생성(textProcessor)
myprocess <- textProcessor(
  documents = df$Token,
  metadata = df,
  wordLengths = c(2, Inf),      
  lowercase = FALSE,              
  removenumbers = FALSE,
  removepunctuation = FALSE,
  removestopwords = FALSE,
  stem = FALSE,
  customstopwords = stopwords
)

# 9. vocab 중복 제거 반영 (myprocess$vocab에 unique 적용)
myprocess$vocab <- unique(myprocess$vocab)

# 10. 5개 이상의 문서에 등장한 단어만 사용
out <- prepDocuments(
  myprocess$documents,
  myprocess$vocab,
  myprocess$meta,
  lower.thresh = 5
)

# 11. 결과 저장
save_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "topic_selection_results", "STM")
if (!dir.exists(save_dir)) dir.create(save_dir, recursive = TRUE)
saveRDS(out, file = file.path(save_dir, "out_preprocessed.rds"))

cat("STM용 데이터 전처리 및 저장 완료!\n")



```

## 토픽수 탐색 searchK

```{r}

# Exclusivity 포함, Lower Bound 제외한 4분할 그래프 생성


# ===============================================
# [설정 섹션] 사용자 커스터마이징 구간
# ===============================================

# 토픽 수 범위 설정 (K_min:K_max)
K_min <- 7
K_max <- 20

# 시드값 (재현성 보장)
SEED_VALUE <- 2024

# EM 알고리즘 최대 반복 횟수
MAX_EM_ITS <- 75

# 병렬 처리 코어 수 (1 = 단일 코어, >1 = 병렬 처리)
N_CORES <- 1

# 그래프 해상도 (DPI)
GRAPH_DPI <- 300

# 그래프 크기 설정
GRAPH_WIDTH <- 12
GRAPH_HEIGHT <- 9

# =================================================

# 1. 패키지 로드
library(stm)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(rlang)

# 2. 파일 경로 설정
base_dir <- getwd()
searchK_rds_path <- file.path(base_dir, "topic_selection_results", "STM", "model_searchK.rds")
out_rds_path <- file.path(base_dir, "topic_selection_results", "STM", "out_preprocessed.rds")
output_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "topic_selection_results", "STM")

# output_dir 생성 (없으면)
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# ====================================================
# 3. searchK 결과 불러오기 또는 새로 계산
# ====================================================
if (file.exists(searchK_rds_path)) {
  message("저장된 searchK 결과를 불러옵니다.")
  model_searchK <- readRDS(searchK_rds_path)
} else {
  message("searchK 결과 파일이 없어 새로 계산합니다.")
  out <- readRDS(out_rds_path)
  out$meta$Date <- as.Date(out$meta$Date)
  out$meta$Year <- as.numeric(format(out$meta$Date, "%Y"))
  
  # Publisher, Voca 컬럼 존재 여부에 따라 prevalence 공식 결정
  if ("Publisher" %in% colnames(out$meta) & "Voca" %in% colnames(out$meta)) {
    prevalence_formula <- ~Publisher + Voca + s(Year)
    out$meta$Publisher <- as.factor(out$meta$Publisher)
    out$meta$Voca <- as.factor(out$meta$Voca)
    message("Prevalence formula: ~Publisher + Voca + s(Year)")
  } else if ("Publisher" %in% colnames(out$meta)) {
    prevalence_formula <- ~Publisher + s(Year)
    out$meta$Publisher <- as.factor(out$meta$Publisher)
    message("Prevalence formula: ~Publisher + s(Year)")
  } else if ("Voca" %in% colnames(out$meta)) {
    prevalence_formula <- ~Voca + s(Year)
    out$meta$Voca <- as.factor(out$meta$Voca)
    message("Prevalence formula: ~Voca + s(Year)")
  } else {
    prevalence_formula <- ~s(Year)
    message("Prevalence formula: ~s(Year)")
  }
  
  # 설정 섹션에서 정의한 K 범위 사용
  k_candidates <- K_min:K_max
  message(sprintf("searchK 실행: K = %s", paste(k_candidates, collapse = ", ")))
  
  model_searchK <- searchK(
    documents = out$documents,
    vocab = out$vocab,
    K = k_candidates,
    prevalence = prevalence_formula,
    data = out$meta,
    init.type = "Spectral",
    seed = SEED_VALUE,
    max.em.its = MAX_EM_ITS,
    cores = N_CORES
  )
  
  saveRDS(model_searchK, searchK_rds_path)
  message(sprintf("searchK 결과가 저장되었습니다: %s", searchK_rds_path))
}

# ===================================================
# 4. 결과 데이터프레임 정리 및 타입 변환
# ===================================================
results_df <- model_searchK$results %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(
    K = as.integer(K),
    semcoh = as.numeric(semcoh),
    exclus = as.numeric(exclus),
    heldout = as.numeric(heldout),
    residual = as.numeric(residual),
    bound = as.numeric(bound)
  )

message("결과 데이터프레임 구조:")
print(str(results_df))
message("\n결과 데이터프레임 (처음 5행):")
print(head(results_df, 5))

# ==================================================
# 5. ggplot2 + gridExtra로 4분할 그래프 생성
#    (Lower Bound 제외, Exclusivity 포함)
# ==================================================

# 5-1. Held-Out Likelihood 그래프
p1 <- ggplot(results_df, aes(x = K, y = heldout)) +
  geom_line(color = "#2E86AB", size = 1) + 
  geom_point(color = "#2E86AB", size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Held-Out Likelihood",
       x = "Number of Topics (K)",
       y = "Likelihood") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = unique(results_df$K))

# 5-2. Residuals 그래프
p2 <- ggplot(results_df, aes(x = K, y = residual)) +
  geom_line(color = "#A23B72", size = 1) + 
  geom_point(color = "#A23B72", size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Residuals",
       x = "Number of Topics (K)",
       y = "Residuals") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = unique(results_df$K))

# 5-3. Semantic Coherence 그래프
p3 <- ggplot(results_df, aes(x = K, y = semcoh)) +
  geom_line(color = "#F18F01", size = 1) + 
  geom_point(color = "#F18F01", size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Semantic Coherence",
       x = "Number of Topics (K)",
       y = "Coherence") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = unique(results_df$K))

# 5-4. Exclusivity 그래프
p4 <- ggplot(results_df, aes(x = K, y = exclus)) +
  geom_line(color = "#C73E1D", size = 1) + 
  geom_point(color = "#C73E1D", size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Exclusivity",
       x = "Number of Topics (K)",
       y = "Exclusivity") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = unique(results_df$K))

# 5-5. 4분할 그래프를 하나의 이미지로 저장
combined_plot_path <- file.path(output_dir, "searchK_diagnostic_4metrics.png")

g <- arrangeGrob(p1, p2, p3, p4, 
                 ncol = 2, nrow = 2,
                 top = "Diagnostic Values by Number of Topics")

ggsave(filename = combined_plot_path, 
       plot = g, 
       width = GRAPH_WIDTH, 
       height = GRAPH_HEIGHT,
       dpi = GRAPH_DPI)

message(sprintf("4분할 진단 그래프가 저장되었습니다: %s", combined_plot_path))

# ===============================================
# 6. 개별 그래프 저장 (선택사항: 각 지표별 고해상도 그래프)
# ===============================================
metrics <- c("semcoh", "exclus", "heldout", "residual")
metric_labels <- c(
  "semcoh" = "Semantic Coherence",
  "exclus" = "Exclusivity",
  "heldout" = "Held-Out Likelihood",
  "residual" = "Residuals"
)

for (metric in metrics) {
  p <- ggplot(results_df, aes(x = K, y = .data[[metric]])) +
    geom_line(color = "#2E86AB", size = 1) + 
    geom_point(color = "#2E86AB", size = 3) +
    ggtitle(paste("SearchK Diagnostic:", metric_labels[metric])) +
    labs(x = "Number of Topics (K)", y = metric_labels[metric]) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13, face = "bold"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 11)
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = unique(results_df$K))
  
  individual_plot_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("searchK_", metric, ".png"))
  ggsave(filename = individual_plot_path,
         plot = p, 
         width = 9, 
         height = 6,
         dpi = GRAPH_DPI)
  
  message(sprintf("  ✓ %s 그래프 저장됨: %s", metric_labels[metric], individual_plot_path))
}

# =============================================
# 7. 분석 결과 요약 테이블 저장
# =============================================

# 최적값 찾기 (방향성 고려)
results_summary <- results_df %>%
  mutate(
    # Held-out likelihood: 높을수록 좋음 → 정규화 (높은 값을 높은 스코어로)
    score_heldout = scale(heldout, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
    
    # Residuals: 낮을수록 좋음 → 반전 정규화
    score_residual = -scale(residual, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
    
    # Semantic Coherence: 높을수록 좋음 (음수, 0에 가까울수록 좋음) → 정규화
    score_semcoh = scale(semcoh, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
    
    # Exclusivity: 높을수록 좋음 → 정규화
    score_exclus = scale(exclus, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1]
  ) %>%
  # 4가지 지표의 가중 평균 (동등 가중치)
  mutate(
    composite_score = (score_heldout + score_residual + score_semcoh + score_exclus) / 4
  ) %>%
  select(K, semcoh, exclus, heldout, residual, composite_score) %>%
  arrange(desc(composite_score))

message("\n=== 종합 분석 결과 (Composite Score 기준, 상위 5개) ===")
print(head(results_summary, 5))

# 결과 테이블 CSV 저장
results_summary_path <- file.path(output_dir, "searchK_summary_table.csv")
write_csv(results_summary, results_summary_path)
message(sprintf("\n결과 테이블이 저장되었습니다: %s", results_summary_path))



```

## 토픽별 키워드와 비중

```{r}

# 0. 토픽 수 설정
topic_numbers <- c(11)

# 0-1. 상위 문서 수 설정
top_docs_count <- 50

# 1. 패키지 로드
library(openxlsx)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(stm)

# 2. 기본 경로 설정
base_dir <- getwd()

# 3. 전처리된 STM 데이터 불러오기
out <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "topic_selection_results", "STM", "out_preprocessed.rds"))

# 3-1. authoress_original.xlsx 파일 불러오기 (Contents 추출용)
authoress_original <- read.xlsx(file.path(base_dir, "authoress_original.xlsx"))
authoress_original$Date <- as.Date(paste(authoress_original$Year, authoress_original$Month, authoress_original$Day, sep = "-"))

# 4. 메타데이터 변수 타입 및 formula 자동설정
meta_names <- names(out$meta)

if ("Publisher" %in% meta_names) {
  if (!is.factor(out$meta$Publisher)) {
    out$meta$Publisher <- as.factor(out$meta$Publisher)
  }
}

hasVoca <- "Voca" %in% meta_names && all(!is.na(out$meta$Voca))
if (hasVoca) {
  out$meta$Voca <- as.factor(out$meta$Voca)
}

# 날짜 형식 유지
if ("Date" %in% meta_names) {
  out$meta$Date <- as.Date(out$meta$Date)
}

# prevalence formula 설정 (존재하는 변수만 반영)
if (hasVoca && "Publisher" %in% meta_names) {
  prevalence_formula <- ~Publisher + Voca + s(Date)
} else if ("Publisher" %in% meta_names) {
  prevalence_formula <- ~Publisher + s(Date)
} else if (hasVoca) {
  prevalence_formula <- ~Voca + s(Date)
} else {
  prevalence_formula <- ~s(Date)
}

# 5~12. 설정한 토픽 수별로 반복 실행
for (optimal_K in topic_numbers) {
  cat("============================================\n")
  cat("   STM 분석 시작: 토픽 수 =", optimal_K, "\n")
  cat("============================================\n")
  
  save_dir <- file.path(base_dir, paste0("STM_", optimal_K))
  if (!dir.exists(save_dir)) dir.create(save_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  
  stm_model_path <- file.path(save_dir, "stm_model.rds")
  if (file.exists(stm_model_path)) {
    stm_model <- readRDS(stm_model_path)
    cat("기존 모델 불러옴:", stm_model_path, "\n")
  } else {
    stm_model <- stm(
      documents = out$documents,
      vocab = out$vocab,
      K = optimal_K,
      prevalence = prevalence_formula,
      data = out$meta,
      init.type = "Spectral",
      seed = 2024,
      max.em.its = 75,
      verbose = FALSE
    )
    saveRDS(stm_model, stm_model_path)
    cat("새 모델 학습 및 저장:", stm_model_path, "\n")
  }

  topic_labels <- labelTopics(stm_model, n = 10)
  keyword_types <- c("prob", "frex", "lift", "score")

  prob_keywords <- as.data.frame(topic_labels$prob)
  rownames(prob_keywords) <- paste0("Topic_", 1:nrow(prob_keywords))
  colnames(prob_keywords) <- paste0("Rank_", 1:ncol(prob_keywords))

  frex_keywords <- as.data.frame(topic_labels$frex)
  rownames(frex_keywords) <- paste0("Topic_", 1:nrow(frex_keywords))
  colnames(frex_keywords) <- paste0("Rank_", 1:ncol(frex_keywords))

  beta_matrix <- exp(stm_model$beta$logbeta[[1]])
  vocab <- stm_model$vocab
  n_rank <- ncol(topic_labels$prob)

  keyword_contrib_long <- list()
  for (k in 1:optimal_K) {
    for (type in keyword_types) {
      terms <- topic_labels[[type]][k, ]
      idx <- match(terms, vocab)
      probs <- beta_matrix[k, idx]
      rank_cols <- setNames(
        as.list(sprintf("%s (%.4f)", terms, probs)),
        paste0("Rank_", 1:n_rank)
      )
      keyword_contrib_long[[length(keyword_contrib_long) + 1]] <- 
        data.frame(
          Topic = paste0("Topic_", k),
          Type = type,
          rank_cols,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
    }
  }
  keyword_contrib_df <- do.call(rbind, keyword_contrib_long)
  keyword_contrib_df <- keyword_contrib_df %>% arrange(Topic, factor(Type, levels = keyword_types))

  topic_matrix <- stm_model[["theta"]]
  average_topic_proportions <- colMeans(topic_matrix)
  topic_proportion <- data.frame(
    Topic = paste0("Topic_", 1:optimal_K),
    Proportion = average_topic_proportions
  )
  topic_proportion$Percent <- sprintf("%.2f%%", topic_proportion$Proportion * 100)

  topic_proportion_sorted <- topic_proportion %>%
    arrange(desc(Proportion))

  # 날짜 형식을 유지해서 저장
  top_docs_list <- lapply(1:optimal_K, function(k) {
    top_idx <- order(topic_matrix[, k], decreasing = TRUE)[1:top_docs_count]
    
    # Contents 추출 함수
    get_contents <- function(date, publisher, title) {
      matching_rows <- authoress_original %>%
        filter(Date == date & Publisher == publisher & Title == title)
      
      if (nrow(matching_rows) > 0) {
        return(matching_rows$Contents[1])
      } else {
        return(NA)
      }
    }
    
    df <- data.frame(
      Topic = paste0("Topic_", k),
      Rank = 1:top_docs_count,
      Proportion = topic_matrix[top_idx, k],
      Date = if ("Date" %in% meta_names) out$meta$Date[top_idx] else NA,
      Publisher = if ("Publisher" %in% meta_names) out$meta$Publisher[top_idx] else NA,
      Title = if ("Title" %in% meta_names) out$meta$Title[top_idx] else NA,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    # Contents 열 추가
    if ("Date" %in% meta_names & "Publisher" %in% meta_names & "Title" %in% meta_names) {
      df$Contents <- mapply(get_contents, df$Date, df$Publisher, df$Title)
    } else {
      df$Contents <- NA
    }
    
    # Voca 열 추가
    if (hasVoca) {
      df$Voca <- out$meta$Voca[top_idx]
    } else {
      df$Voca <- NA
    }
    
    return(df)
  })
  top_docs_df <- bind_rows(top_docs_list)
  
  # Date 열을 문자열로 변환 (yyyy-mm-dd 형식)
  if ("Date" %in% colnames(top_docs_df)) {
    top_docs_df$Date <- as.character(top_docs_df$Date)
  }

  # Prob 키워드를 비중 순서로 정렬한 버전
  prob_keywords_sorted <- prob_keywords[order(match(rownames(prob_keywords), topic_proportion_sorted$Topic)), ]
  
  # FREX 키워드를 비중 순서로 정렬한 버전
  frex_keywords_sorted <- frex_keywords[order(match(rownames(frex_keywords), topic_proportion_sorted$Topic)), ]

  output_file <- file.path(save_dir, paste0("STM_", optimal_K, ".xlsx"))
  wb <- createWorkbook()

  addWorksheet(wb, "토픽별_비중")
  addWorksheet(wb, "토픽별_Prob")
  addWorksheet(wb, "토픽별_FREX")
  addWorksheet(wb, "키워드 기여도")
  addWorksheet(wb, paste0("토픽별 상위 ", top_docs_count, "문서"))

  # 토픽별_비중 시트
  writeData(wb, "토픽별_비중", "1. 토픽 번호순", startRow = 1, startCol = 1)
  writeData(wb, "토픽별_비중", topic_proportion, startRow = 2, rowNames = FALSE)
  start_row_sorted <- nrow(topic_proportion) + 4
  writeData(wb, "토픽별_비중", "2. 비중 내림차순", startRow = start_row_sorted - 1, startCol = 1)
  writeData(wb, "토픽별_비중", topic_proportion_sorted, startRow = start_row_sorted, rowNames = FALSE)

  # 토픽별_Prob 시트 (번호순 + 비중순)
  writeData(wb, "토픽별_Prob", "1. 토픽 번호순", startRow = 1, startCol = 1)
  
  # 비중 정보와 함께 출력
  prob_with_proportion <- cbind(
    Proportion = topic_proportion$Proportion[match(rownames(prob_keywords), topic_proportion$Topic)],
    Percent = topic_proportion$Percent[match(rownames(prob_keywords), topic_proportion$Topic)],
    prob_keywords
  )
  writeData(wb, "토픽별_Prob", prob_with_proportion, startRow = 2, rowNames = TRUE)
  
  start_row_prob <- nrow(prob_keywords) + 4
  writeData(wb, "토픽별_Prob", "2. 비중 내림차순", startRow = start_row_prob, startCol = 1)
  
  prob_sorted_with_proportion <- cbind(
    Proportion = topic_proportion_sorted$Proportion,
    Percent = topic_proportion_sorted$Percent,
    prob_keywords_sorted
  )
  writeData(wb, "토픽별_Prob", prob_sorted_with_proportion, startRow = start_row_prob + 1, rowNames = TRUE)

  # 토픽별_FREX 시트 (번호순 + 비중순)
  writeData(wb, "토픽별_FREX", "1. 토픽 번호순", startRow = 1, startCol = 1)
  
  # 비중 정보와 함께 출력
  frex_with_proportion <- cbind(
    Proportion = topic_proportion$Proportion[match(rownames(frex_keywords), topic_proportion$Topic)],
    Percent = topic_proportion$Percent[match(rownames(frex_keywords), topic_proportion$Topic)],
    frex_keywords
  )
  writeData(wb, "토픽별_FREX", frex_with_proportion, startRow = 2, rowNames = TRUE)
  
  start_row_frex <- nrow(frex_keywords) + 4
  writeData(wb, "토픽별_FREX", "2. 비중 내림차순", startRow = start_row_frex, startCol = 1)
  
  frex_sorted_with_proportion <- cbind(
    Proportion = topic_proportion_sorted$Proportion,
    Percent = topic_proportion_sorted$Percent,
    frex_keywords_sorted
  )
  writeData(wb, "토픽별_FREX", frex_sorted_with_proportion, startRow = start_row_frex + 1, rowNames = TRUE)

  # 키워드 기여도 시트
  writeData(wb, "키워드 기여도", keyword_contrib_df)
  
  # 토픽별 상위 문서 시트
  docs_sheet_name <- paste0("토픽별 상위 ", top_docs_count, "문서")
  writeData(wb, docs_sheet_name, top_docs_df)
  
  # 토픽별 상위 문서 시트에 맑은 고딕 폰트 적용
  addStyle(wb, docs_sheet_name, 
           createStyle(fontName = "맑은 고딕"), 
           rows = 1:(nrow(top_docs_df) + 1), 
           cols = 1:ncol(top_docs_df), 
           gridExpand = TRUE)

  saveWorkbook(wb, output_file, overwrite = TRUE)
  cat("Saved STM results for K =", optimal_K, "to:", output_file, "\n")

  # effect model formula에 존재하는 변수만 반영해 동적으로 구성
  pred_var_list <- c()
  if ("Publisher" %in% meta_names) pred_var_list <- c(pred_var_list, "Publisher")
  if (hasVoca) pred_var_list <- c(pred_var_list, "Voca")
  pred_var_list <- c(pred_var_list, "s(Date)")
  effect_formula_str <- paste0("1:", optimal_K, " ~ ", paste(pred_var_list, collapse = " + "))
  effect_formula <- as.formula(effect_formula_str)

  stm_effect_model <- estimateEffect(
    effect_formula,
    stm_model,
    meta = out$meta,
    uncertainty = "Global",
    prior = 1e-5
  )
  saveRDS(stm_effect_model, file.path(save_dir, "stm_effect_model.rds"))

  cat("============================================\n\n")
}

```

## 토픽 비중 추이

```{r}

library(stm)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(scales)
library(openxlsx)

# ====== 사용자 설정 영역 (여기서만 수정) ======
K_list <- c(11)    # 실행할 토픽 수 목록 예(10,11,12)
year_min <- 1990             # 분석 시작 연도
year_max <- 2025             # 분석 종료 연도
year_breaks <- 5             # X축 연도 라벨 간격

# ====== 그래프 폰트 크기 설정 ======
font_size_title_all <- 22     # 전체 그래프 제목 폰트
font_size_base_all <- 20      # 전체 그래프 기본 폰트 (축, 범례 등)
font_size_axis_all <- 16      # 전체 그래프 축 눈금 폰트

font_size_title_topic <- 22   # 개별 토픽 그래프 제목 폰트
font_size_base_topic <- 18    # 개별 토픽 그래프 기본 폰트
font_size_axis_topic <- 14    # 개별 토픽 그래프 축 눈금 폰트

# ====== 반복 처리 시작 (모든 K에 대해 실행) ======
for (optimal_K in K_list) {
  
  # ====== 폴더 설정 ======
  base_dir <- file.path(getwd(), paste0("STM_", optimal_K))
  date_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "Trend")
  if (!dir.exists(date_dir)) dir.create(date_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # ====== 모델 및 데이터 불러오기 ======
  stm_model <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "stm_model.rds"))
  out <- readRDS(file.path(getwd(), "topic_selection_results", "STM", "out_preprocessed.rds"))
  meta <- out$meta
  
  # ====== 문서별 토픽 분포와 연도 결합 ======
  theta_df <- as.data.frame(stm_model$theta)[, 1:optimal_K]
  colnames(theta_df) <- paste0("Topic_", 1:optimal_K)
  theta_df$Year <- year(meta$Date)
  
  # ====== 전체 누적 면적 그래프용 연도별 평균 비중 ======
  topic_year_long <- theta_df %>%
    group_by(Year) %>%
    summarise(across(starts_with("Topic_"), mean, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    filter(Year >= year_min, Year <= year_max) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Topic_"),
                 names_to = "Topic",
                 values_to = "Proportion") %>%
    arrange(Topic, Year)
  
  topic_year_long$Topic_label <- factor(topic_year_long$Topic,
                                        levels = paste0("Topic_", 1:optimal_K))
  
  # ====== 전체 누적 면적 그래프 (연도별) ======
  p_area <- ggplot(topic_year_long, aes(x = Year, y = Proportion, fill = Topic_label)) +
    geom_area(position = "fill", color = "white", size = 0.2, alpha = 0.95) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(year_min, year_max, by = year_breaks), 
                       limits = c(year_min, year_max), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    labs(title = "연도별 토픽 비중 (100% 누적 면적 그래프)",
         x = "연도", y = "비중(%)") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = font_size_base_all) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = font_size_title_all),
          axis.title = element_text(size = font_size_base_all),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = font_size_axis_all),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = font_size_axis_all),
          legend.text = element_text(size = font_size_base_all - 2),
          legend.title = element_text(size = font_size_base_all),
          plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
          legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
          legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA))
  
  ggsave(filename = file.path(date_dir, 
                              paste0("연도별_토픽비중_전체_", year_min, "_", year_max, ".png")),
         plot = p_area, width = 12, height = 7, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
  
  # ====== 개별 토픽별 꺾은선 그래프 (연도별, y축 0% 고정) ======
  for (k in 1:optimal_K) {
    topic_name <- paste0("Topic_", k)
    topic_data <- topic_year_long %>% filter(Topic_label == topic_name)
    
    p_topic <- ggplot(topic_data, aes(x = Year, y = Proportion, group = 1)) +
      geom_line(color = "#2C3E50", linewidth = 1) +
      geom_point(color = "#2980B9", size = 2) +
      scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(year_min, year_max, by = year_breaks), 
                         limits = c(year_min, year_max)) +
      scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0, NA)) +
      labs(title = topic_name,
           x = "연도", y = "평균 비중(%)") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = font_size_base_topic) +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = font_size_title_topic),
            axis.title = element_text(size = font_size_base_topic),
            axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = font_size_axis_topic),
            axis.text.y = element_text(size = font_size_axis_topic))
    
    ggsave(filename = file.path(date_dir, paste0("연도별_토픽비중_", topic_name, ".png")),
           plot = p_topic, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
  }
  
  # ====== 연도별 토픽 비중 데이터 엑셀 저장 ======
  wb <- createWorkbook()
  addWorksheet(wb, "연도별_토픽비중_데이터")
  writeData(wb, "연도별_토픽비중_데이터", topic_year_long)
  excel_filename <- paste0("STM_", optimal_K, "_yearly.xlsx")
  saveWorkbook(wb, file.path(date_dir, excel_filename), overwrite = TRUE)
  
  cat("\n✓ K=", optimal_K, " 분석 완료!\n", sep = "")
}

cat("\n====== 모든 분석 완료 ======\n")

```

## 어휘별 효과추정

```{r}
library(stm)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(openxlsx)
library(scales)
library(tidyr)

optimal_K <- 8

# 1. 경로 설정
base_dir <- file.path(getwd(), paste0("STM_", optimal_K))
voca_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "Voca")
barplot_dir <- file.path(voca_dir, "barplot")
diffplot_dir <- file.path(voca_dir, "differenceplot")
if (!dir.exists(barplot_dir)) dir.create(barplot_dir, recursive = TRUE)
if (!dir.exists(diffplot_dir)) dir.create(diffplot_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# 2. 모델, 데이터 불러오기
stm_model <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "stm_model.rds"))
out <- readRDS(file.path(getwd(), "topic_selection_results", "STM", "out_preprocessed.rds"))
meta <- out$meta

# 3. Voca_group 생성
meta$Voca_group <- as.factor(meta$Voca)

# 4. barplot: 각 토픽별로 x축에 Voca_group이 나란히
theta_df <- as.data.frame(stm_model$theta)
colnames(theta_df) <- paste0("Topic_", 1:optimal_K)
theta_df$Voca_group <- meta$Voca_group

topic_voca_long <- theta_df %>%
  group_by(Voca_group) %>%
  summarise(across(starts_with("Topic_"), mean, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Topic_"),
               names_to = "Topic",
               values_to = "Proportion") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Voca_group)) %>%
  arrange(Topic, Voca_group)

# barplot 저장 (토픽별 K개 그래프)
for (k in 1:optimal_K) {
  topic_name <- paste0("Topic_", k)
  voca_data <- topic_voca_long %>% filter(Topic == topic_name)
  p_voca <- ggplot(voca_data, aes(x = Voca_group, y = Proportion, fill = Voca_group)) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
    labs(title = paste0("토픽별 Voca 그룹 비중 (", topic_name, ")"),
         x = "Voca 그룹", y = "비중(%)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
    )
  ggsave(filename = file.path(barplot_dir, paste0("토픽별_Voca비중_barplot_", topic_name, ".png")),
         plot = p_voca, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
}

# barplot 데이터 엑셀 저장
wb_bar <- createWorkbook()
addWorksheet(wb_bar, "Voca별_토픽비중_데이터")
writeData(wb_bar, "Voca별_토픽비중_데이터", topic_voca_long)
excel_filename_bar <- paste0("STM_", optimal_K, "_voca_barplot.xlsx")
saveWorkbook(wb_bar, file.path(barplot_dir, excel_filename_bar), overwrite = TRUE)

# 5. difference plot (엑셀 파일이 있으면 불러오고, 없으면 계산/저장)
excel_path <- file.path(diffplot_dir, "differenceplot_all_vocagroups.xlsx")
unique_groups <- na.omit(unique(meta$Voca_group))

if (file.exists(excel_path)) {
  sheet_names <- getSheetNames(excel_path)
  result_list <- lapply(sheet_names, function(sheet) {
    read.xlsx(excel_path, sheet = sheet)
  })
  names(result_list) <- sheet_names
} else {
  wb <- createWorkbook()
  result_list <- list()
  for (group in unique_groups) {
    meta$Voca_group2 <- ifelse(meta$Voca_group == group, as.character(group), "전체")
    meta$Voca_group2 <- factor(meta$Voca_group2, levels = c(as.character(group), "전체"))
    stm_effect_model <- estimateEffect(1:optimal_K ~ Voca_group2, stm_model, meta = meta, uncertainty = "Global")
    eff_summary <- summary(stm_effect_model, topics = 1:optimal_K)
    result_df <- lapply(eff_summary$tables, function(tab) {
      data.frame(
        Estimate = tab[2, "Estimate"],
        StdError = tab[2, "Std. Error"],
        p_value = tab[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]
      )
    }) %>% bind_rows()
    result_df$Topic <- paste0("Topic ", 1:optimal_K)
    result_df$stars <- cut(result_df$p_value,
      breaks = c(-Inf, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, Inf),
      labels = c("***", "**", "*", "")
    )
    result_df$Topic <- factor(result_df$Topic, levels = paste0("Topic ", 1:optimal_K))
    result_df <- result_df[, c("Topic", "stars", "p_value", "Estimate", "StdError")]
    addWorksheet(wb, as.character(group))
    writeData(wb, as.character(group), result_df)
    result_list[[as.character(group)]] <- result_df
  }
  saveWorkbook(wb, excel_path, overwrite = TRUE)
}

```

## 어휘별 그래프 그리기

```{r}

# ====== 패키지 로드 ======
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(openxlsx)

# ====== 토픽 개수 및 경로 설정 ======
optimal_K <- 8
base_dir <- file.path(getwd(), paste0("STM_", optimal_K))
voca_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "Voca")
diffplot_dir <- file.path(voca_dir, "differenceplot")

# 폴더 생성
if (!dir.exists(diffplot_dir)) dir.create(diffplot_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# ====== difference plot 그리기 (어휘 조합별, 신문사 코드와 동일 디자인) ======
for (group in names(result_list)) {
  result_df <- result_list[[group]]
  
  # 토픽 번호 추출 및 오름차순 정렬
  result_df <- result_df %>%
    mutate(Topic_num = as.numeric(gsub("Topic ", "", Topic))) %>%
    arrange(Topic_num) %>%
    mutate(Topic = factor(Topic, levels = Topic))
  
  # 유의미성 판정 (별 표기용)
  result_df <- result_df %>%
    mutate(stars = cut(p_value,
                       breaks = c(-Inf, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, Inf),
                       labels = c("***", "**", "*", "")))
  
  # ====== 신문사 코드와 동일한 디자인 ======
  p_clean <- ggplot(result_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = Topic, fill = Estimate > 0)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.5) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = Estimate - 1.96 * StdError, 
                       xmax = Estimate + 1.96 * StdError),
                   color = "black",
                   height = 0.3, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_text(aes(label = stars, x = Estimate + 0.005), 
              color = "darkred", hjust = 0, size = 6, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#E74C3C", "FALSE" = "#3498DB"),
                      labels = c("TRUE" = paste0(group, " < 평균 (덜 다룸)"), 
                                 "FALSE" = paste0(group, " > 평균 (더 강조)")),
                      name = "상대 비중") +
    labs(
      title = paste0("주요 어휘별 토픽 편향 분석: ", group),
      x = "효과크기 (Estimate)\n[음수: 평균보다 더 강조 | 양수: 평균보다 덜 다룸]",
      y = "토픽"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_family = "NanumGothic") +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 15)),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, margin = margin(t = 15), color = "darkred", face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 10, l = 10)
    )
  
  ggsave(filename = file.path(diffplot_dir, paste0("differenceplot_", group, "_final.png")),
         plot = p_clean, width = 10, height = 6.5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
  
  # ====== 데이터 요약 출력 ======
  cat("\n")
  cat(paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
  cat(group, "\n")
  cat(paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
  
  cat("\n✓ 평균보다 더 강조하는 토픽 (파랑색, 음수, p<0.05):\n")
  cat(paste(rep("-", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
  more_emphasis <- result_df %>% 
    filter(Estimate < 0, p_value < 0.05) %>% 
    select(Topic, Estimate, StdError, p_value, stars) %>%
    mutate(
      Estimate = round(Estimate, 4),
      StdError = round(StdError, 4),
      p_value = round(p_value, 5)
    ) %>%
    arrange(Estimate)
  
  if (nrow(more_emphasis) > 0) {
    print(more_emphasis, row.names = FALSE)
  } else {
    cat("  없음\n")
  }
  
  cat("\n✗ 평균보다 덜 다루는 토픽 (빨강색, 양수, p<0.05):\n")
  cat(paste(rep("-", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
  less_emphasis <- result_df %>% 
    filter(Estimate > 0, p_value < 0.05) %>%
    select(Topic, Estimate, StdError, p_value, stars) %>%
    mutate(
      Estimate = round(Estimate, 4),
      StdError = round(StdError, 4),
      p_value = round(p_value, 5)
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(Estimate))
  
  if (nrow(less_emphasis) > 0) {
    print(less_emphasis, row.names = FALSE)
  } else {
    cat("  없음\n")
  }
  
  cat("\n중립적 토픽 (p ≥ 0.05, 통계적으로 유의미하지 않음):\n")
  cat(paste(rep("-", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
  neutral <- result_df %>% 
    filter(p_value >= 0.05) %>%
    select(Topic, Estimate, StdError, p_value) %>%
    mutate(
      Estimate = round(Estimate, 4),
      StdError = round(StdError, 4),
      p_value = round(p_value, 5)
    )
  
  if (nrow(neutral) > 0) {
    print(neutral, row.names = FALSE)
  } else {
    cat("  없음\n")
  }
}

cat("\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
print("✓ 모든 어휘별 difference plot이 생성되었습니다!")
cat("저장 위치:", diffplot_dir, "\n")
cat("파일명: differenceplot_[어휘명]_final.png\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
```

## 언론사별 효과추정

```{r}

library(stm)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(openxlsx)
library(scales)
library(tidyr)

# ====== 토픽 개수 설정 ======
optimal_K <- 11

# ====== 폴더 설정 및 생성 ======
base_dir <- file.path(getwd(), paste0("STM_", optimal_K))
publisher_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "Publisher")
barplot_dir <- file.path(publisher_dir, "barplot")
diffplot_dir <- file.path(publisher_dir, "differenceplot")
if (!dir.exists(barplot_dir)) dir.create(barplot_dir, recursive = TRUE)
if (!dir.exists(diffplot_dir)) dir.create(diffplot_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# ====== 모델 및 데이터 불러오기 ======
stm_model <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "stm_model.rds"))
out <- readRDS(file.path(getwd(), "topic_selection_results", "STM", "out_preprocessed.rds"))
meta <- out$meta

# ====== 문서별 토픽 분포와 신문사 결합 ======
theta_df <- as.data.frame(stm_model$theta)
colnames(theta_df) <- paste0("Topic_", 1:optimal_K)
theta_df$Publisher <- meta$Publisher

# ====== 신문사별 토픽별 평균 비중 계산 (barplot용) ======
topic_publisher_long <- theta_df %>%
  group_by(Publisher) %>%
  summarise(across(starts_with("Topic_"), mean, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Topic_"),
               names_to = "Topic",
               values_to = "Proportion") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Publisher)) %>%
  arrange(Topic, Publisher)

# ====== 토픽별 신문사 평균 비중 barplot 저장 (각 토픽별) ======
for (k in 1:optimal_K) {
  topic_name <- paste0("Topic_", k)
  pub_data <- topic_publisher_long %>% filter(Topic == topic_name)
  p_pub <- ggplot(pub_data, aes(x = Publisher, y = Proportion, fill = Publisher)) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
    labs(title = paste0("토픽별 신문사 비중 (", topic_name, ")"),
         x = "신문사", y = "비중(%)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
    )
  ggsave(filename = file.path(barplot_dir, paste0("토픽별_신문사비중_barplot_", topic_name, ".png")),
         plot = p_pub, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
}

# ====== barplot 데이터 엑셀 저장 ======
wb_bar <- createWorkbook()
addWorksheet(wb_bar, "신문사별_토픽비중_데이터")
writeData(wb_bar, "신문사별_토픽비중_데이터", topic_publisher_long)
excel_filename_bar <- paste0("STM_", optimal_K, "_publisher_barplot.xlsx")
saveWorkbook(wb_bar, file.path(barplot_dir, excel_filename_bar), overwrite = TRUE)

# ====== difference plot (엑셀 파일이 있으면 불러오고, 없으면 계산/저장) ======
excel_path <- file.path(diffplot_dir, "differenceplot_all_publishers.xlsx")
unique_publishers <- unique(meta$Publisher)

if (file.exists(excel_path)) {
  sheet_names <- getSheetNames(excel_path)
  result_list <- lapply(sheet_names, function(sheet) {
    read.xlsx(excel_path, sheet = sheet)
  })
  names(result_list) <- sheet_names
} else {
  wb <- createWorkbook()
  result_list <- list()
  
  for (pub in unique_publishers) {
    meta$Publisher_group <- ifelse(meta$Publisher == pub, pub, "전체")
    meta$Publisher_group <- factor(meta$Publisher_group, levels = c(pub, "전체"))
    
    stm_effect_model <- estimateEffect(1:optimal_K ~ Publisher_group, 
                                        stm_model, 
                                        meta = meta, 
                                        uncertainty = "Global")
    eff_summary <- summary(stm_effect_model, topics = 1:optimal_K)
    
    result_df <- lapply(eff_summary$tables, function(tab) {
      data.frame(
        Estimate = tab[2, "Estimate"],
        StdError = tab[2, "Std. Error"],
        p_value = tab[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]
      )
    }) %>% bind_rows()
    
    result_df$Topic <- paste0("Topic ", 1:optimal_K)
    result_df$stars <- cut(result_df$p_value,
                           breaks = c(-Inf, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, Inf),
                           labels = c("***", "**", "*", ""))
    result_df$Topic <- factor(result_df$Topic, levels = paste0("Topic ", 1:optimal_K))
    result_df <- result_df[, c("Topic", "stars", "p_value", "Estimate", "StdError")]
    
    addWorksheet(wb, pub)
    writeData(wb, pub, result_df)
    result_list[[pub]] <- result_df
  }
  
  saveWorkbook(wb, excel_path, overwrite = TRUE)
}

# ====== difference plot 시각화 (각 신문사별) ======
for (pub in names(result_list)) {
  result_df <- result_list[[pub]]
  
  p_diff <- ggplot(result_df, aes(x = reorder(Topic, Estimate), y = Estimate)) +
    geom_col(aes(fill = ifelse(p_value < 0.05, "유의미", "비유의미"))) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Estimate - 1.96*StdError, ymax = Estimate + 1.96*StdError),
                  width = 0.2, color = "black") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("유의미" = "#E74C3C", "비유의미" = "#95A5A6"),
                      name = "통계적 유의성") +
    labs(title = paste0("신문사별 토픽 차이 - ", pub),
         x = "토픽", y = "효과크기 (Estimate)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
  
  ggsave(filename = file.path(diffplot_dir, paste0("신문사비교_differenceplot_", pub, ".png")),
         plot = p_diff, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
}

print("✓ 모든 분석이 완료되었습니다!")
print(paste0("- Barplot 저장 경로: ", barplot_dir))
print(paste0("- Difference plot 저장 경로: ", diffplot_dir))


```

## 언론사별 그래프 그리기

```{r}
# ====== 패키지 로드 ======
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(openxlsx)

# ====== 토픽 개수 및 경로 설정 ======
optimal_K <- 11
base_dir <- file.path(getwd(), paste0("STM_", optimal_K))
publisher_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "Publisher")
diffplot_dir <- file.path(publisher_dir, "differenceplot")

# ====== difference plot 데이터 불러오기 ======
excel_path <- file.path(diffplot_dir, "differenceplot_all_publishers.xlsx")
if (!file.exists(excel_path)) stop("differenceplot_all_publishers.xlsx 파일이 존재하지 않습니다.")

sheet_names <- getSheetNames(excel_path)
result_list <- lapply(sheet_names, function(sheet) {
  read.xlsx(excel_path, sheet = sheet)
})
names(result_list) <- sheet_names

# ====== difference plot 그리기 (최종 버전: 라벨링 수정) ======
for (pub in names(result_list)) {
  result_df <- result_list[[pub]]
  
  # 토픽 번호 추출 및 오름차순 정렬
  result_df <- result_df %>%
    mutate(Topic_num = as.numeric(gsub("Topic ", "", Topic))) %>%
    arrange(Topic_num) %>%
    mutate(Topic = factor(Topic, levels = Topic))
  
  # 유의미성 판정 (별 표기용)
  result_df <- result_df %>%
    mutate(stars = cut(p_value,
                       breaks = c(-Inf, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, Inf),
                       labels = c("***", "**", "*", "")))
  
  # ====== 최종 버전: 정확한 라벨링 ======
  p_clean <- ggplot(result_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = Topic, fill = Estimate > 0)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.5) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = Estimate - 1.96 * StdError, 
                       xmax = Estimate + 1.96 * StdError),
                   color = "black",
                   height = 0.3, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_text(aes(label = stars, x = Estimate + 0.005), 
              color = "darkred", hjust = 0, size = 6, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#E74C3C", "FALSE" = "#3498DB"),
                      labels = c("TRUE" = paste0(pub, " < 평균 (덜 다룸)"), 
                                 "FALSE" = paste0(pub, " > 평균 (더 강조)")),
                      name = "상대 비중") +
    labs(
      title = paste0("언론사별 토픽 편향 분석: ", pub),
      x = "[음수: 평균보다 더 강조 | 양수: 평균보다 덜 다룸]",
      y = "토픽"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_family = "NanumGothic") +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 15)),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, margin = margin(t = 15), color = "darkred", face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 10, l = 10)
    )
  
  ggsave(filename = file.path(diffplot_dir, paste0("differenceplot_", pub, "_final.png")),
         plot = p_clean, width = 10, height = 6.5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
  
  # ====== 데이터 요약 출력 ======
  cat("\n")
  cat(paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
  cat(pub, "\n")
  cat(paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
  
  cat("\n✓ 평균보다 더 강조하는 토픽 (파랑색, 음수, p<0.05):\n")
  cat(paste(rep("-", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
  more_emphasis <- result_df %>% 
    filter(Estimate < 0, p_value < 0.05) %>% 
    select(Topic, Estimate, StdError, p_value, stars) %>%
    mutate(
      Estimate = round(Estimate, 4),
      StdError = round(StdError, 4),
      p_value = round(p_value, 5)
    ) %>%
    arrange(Estimate)
  
  if (nrow(more_emphasis) > 0) {
    print(more_emphasis, row.names = FALSE)
  } else {
    cat("  없음\n")
  }
  
  cat("\n✗ 평균보다 덜 다루는 토픽 (빨강색, 양수, p<0.05):\n")
  cat(paste(rep("-", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
  less_emphasis <- result_df %>% 
    filter(Estimate > 0, p_value < 0.05) %>%
    select(Topic, Estimate, StdError, p_value, stars) %>%
    mutate(
      Estimate = round(Estimate, 4),
      StdError = round(StdError, 4),
      p_value = round(p_value, 5)
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(Estimate))
  
  if (nrow(less_emphasis) > 0) {
    print(less_emphasis, row.names = FALSE)
  } else {
    cat("  없음\n")
  }
  
  cat("\n중립적 토픽 (p ≥ 0.05, 통계적으로 유의미하지 않음):\n")
  cat(paste(rep("-", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
  neutral <- result_df %>% 
    filter(p_value >= 0.05) %>%
    select(Topic, Estimate, StdError, p_value) %>%
    mutate(
      Estimate = round(Estimate, 4),
      StdError = round(StdError, 4),
      p_value = round(p_value, 5)
    )
  
  if (nrow(neutral) > 0) {
    print(neutral, row.names = FALSE)
  } else {
    cat("  없음\n")
  }
}

cat("\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
print("✓ 모든 difference plot이 생성되었습니다!")
cat("저장 위치:", diffplot_dir, "\n")
cat("파일명: differenceplot_[신문사명]_final.png\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")


```

```{r}

```

```{r}
```
